subcodes.title: Address at Theosophical Society on 1912-10-11
subcodes.first_line: Many investigators of truth hold the opinion that of the seven rays of the Sun of Reality six have emanated and have passed away
subcodes.subjects: @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
